name: Storyly
description: Storyly — in-app Stories SDK for mobile and web, enabling Instagram-style stories inside apps for engagement and commerce.

seo.title: Storyly — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Storyly: Storyly — in-app Stories SDK for mobile and web, enabling Instagram-style stories inside apps for engagement and commerce.

when_to_use: Embedding Instagram-style Stories inside mobile shopping apps
In-app story campaigns for product launches and promotions
Shoppable story content driving conversion inside e-commerce apps

pros: Commerce integrations turn stories into funnels
Cross-platform SDKs for iOS, Android, web
cons: Narrow format — only useful if stories fit your UX
Pricing aimed at mid-market and above
Content ops overhead to keep stories fresh
Risk of story fatigue for users
review.verdict: Best-in-class stories SDK for commerce and media apps; dead weight if stories do not match your product.
review.best_for: Commerce and media apps driving engagement with vertical stories
review.not_for: B2B or productivity apps without visual content ops
